title: Solving Equations
description: Learn algebra by doing, start with puzzles you can solve before anyone mentions a variable.

lesson-01.title: Finding Unknowns
lesson-01.description: Figure out missing amounts using balance scales, no letters yet.

lesson-02.title: Variables
lesson-02.description: Meet x, a name for an unknown you already know how to find.

lesson-03.title: Finding Unknown Values
lesson-03.description: Solve one-step equations by keeping the scale balanced.
